# Dynamic Sag Test

**Summary**: A test to evaluate the settling of particles in a fluid under circulating conditions.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-basfar|Basfar, 2023]] used dynamic sag tests to assess the behavior of fluids during circulation.
